heading: Transfer of administrative jurisdiction to National Park Service
label: 346a–6 Transfer of administrative jurisdiction to National Park Service
text: Administrative jurisdiction over the land identified as the Watchman Wilderness on the Northeastern Washington County Wilderness Map is hereby transferred to the National Park Service, to be included in, and administered as part of Zion National Park.
notes: DefinitionFor definition of “Northeastern Washington County Wilderness Map”, see , set out as a note under .section 1971 of Pub. L. 111–11section 460www of this title
